title: Project scaffolding
summary: Project scaffolding complete — all 5 acceptance criteria verified independently. Go project builds, tests pass, sanity check invertible, version flags work, docs exist with required content.

implementation.evidence: go build ./... exits 0. Module github.com/amattn/logalyzer compiles with no errors.

verification.evidence: GOROOT=/usr/local/go go build ./... exits 0 with no output. Compilation successful.

criteria.description: go test ./... runs and passes with a sanity check test

implementation.evidence: go test ./... passes: cmd/logalyzer (0.468s), internal/parser (cached). TestSanity and TestVersionFlag both pass.

verification.evidence: go test ./... -v shows TestVersionFlag PASS (long_flag, short_flag subtests), TestSanity PASS. Both packages pass: cmd/logalyzer (0.830s), internal/parser (0.187s).

criteria.description: Sanity test asserts true; changing to false makes it fail

implementation.evidence: TestSanity in internal/parser/sanity_test.go asserts want := true, got := true. Changing want to false causes FAIL: sanity_test.go:11: sanity check failed: got true, want false. Test infra is verified.

verification.evidence: Temporarily changed want := true to want := false in sanity_test.go. Test failed with 'sanity check failed: got true, want false' on line 11. Restored original file. Test infrastructure verified.

implementation.evidence: TestVersionFlag in cmd/logalyzer/main_test.go builds binary and tests both --version and -v flags. Both output 'logalyzer v0.1.0-dev'. Test passes.

verification.evidence: Built binary to /tmp/logalyzer_verify. Both --version and -v output 'logalyzer v0.1.0-dev'. Matches expected format.

criteria.description: CLAUDE.md, PLET.md, and README.md exist with appropriate content

implementation.evidence: CLAUDE.md created with project overview, build commands, conventions, and plet reference. PLET.md created with verification commands and iteration conventions. README.md created with overview, setup, usage examples, test instructions, and project structure.

verification.evidence: CLAUDE.md: has project overview, build/test commands, conventions, 'See PLET.md' reference (DX_10). PLET.md: has verification commands, iteration conventions, environment notes. README.md: has overview, setup, usage examples, test instructions, project structure (DX_11). All three files present with appropriate content.

verificationReports.summary: All 5 acceptance criteria pass. Build compiles, tests pass, sanity check is invertible, version flags work, documentation files exist with required content. Additional checks: go vet clean, gofmt clean, no external dependencies.

criteriaResults.oneLiner: go test ./... passes all tests (TestVersionFlag, TestSanity)
Inverting sanity test assertion causes failure as expected
CLAUDE.md, PLET.md, README.md all present with required content

findings: go vet ./... passes with zero warnings (DX_4)
gofmt -l . returns no output — all files properly formatted
All exported symbols have doc comments (DX_5): Version, main package doc, run function
Code follows Go conventions with testable main pattern (DX_7)
